items.name: festhub-aws-s3
items.description: FestHub (Trial Version) is a web platform to explore and manage college fests in one place. Built using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and deployed via AWS S3 static hosting. This MVP demonstrates frontend skills and cloud deployment, with future plans for authentication, backend integration, and enhanced UI/UX.

items.name: react-login-signup-dashboard
items.description: React-based authentication dashboard showcasing production-ready frontend skills: protected routing, reusable component architecture, and scalable state handling. Features responsive Tailwind UI, real-time validation, and UX-focused interactions, reflecting readiness to build secure, user-centric web applications.

items.name: PAPAIWAT
items.description: PAPAIWAT is a web-based platform developed as a technical assessment project for Emwork Group. It demonstrates full-stack development skills, including system design, database architecture, backend development with Laravel, and frontend implementation using Blade.

items.name: software_development_department
items.description: Organize Claude Code into a software engineering department with agents, skills, and rules for structured development workflows

items.name: ai-native-frontend-bootcamp
items.description: Build AI-native frontend skills with a practical bootcamp on AI-friendly stacks, workflows, and tool choices for modern web teams

items.name: teachLink_web
items.description: Frontend: Teachlink is a platform for technocrat where knowlege, skills, ideas, and information that can bring about development and improvement can be shared, dissected, you can also earn from it.

items.name: ProConnect
items.description: Production-ready MERN web app featuring secure JWT auth, role-based access, connection-based feeds, real-time messaging, and optimized MongoDB design. Demonstrates strong frontend, backend, and scalable system architecture skills.

items.name: portfolio-nextjs-project3
items.description: This project is a web application built using Next.js as part of the Bootcamp Lab Phase. It aims to demonstrate frontend development skills and project structuring using modern web technologies.

items.name: acity-connect-frontend
items.description: ACITY Connect Frontend is a web interface for a smart campus marketplace and skill exchange platform designed for Academic City students. It allows users to browse listings, search and filter posts, and interact with item and skill offerings within the campus community.

items.name: openclaw-easy-tutorial-zh-cn
items.description: Guide users step-by-step to set up and use OpenClaw AI assistants in Chinese, from chat basics to multi-agent collaboration without coding skills.

items.name: the-dragon-news-next-project
items.description: A modern News Web App built with Next.js showcasing dynamic routing, API integration, and responsive UI design. It features categorized news, dynamic article pages, and optimized rendering (SSR/SSG). Built to strengthen real-world frontend skills with scalable, component-based architecture and clean UX.

items.name: Web-Dev-Mini-Projects-Archive
items.description: Showcase foundational web development skills with 27 projects, from HTML/CSS layouts to React.js and full-stack CRUD applications.

items.name: codepath-v1
items.description: Teach frontend web development with 40 hands-on HTML, CSS, and Git assignments designed to build skills through real projects and workflows.

items.name: wcag-aaa-web-design
items.description: Build accessible enterprise web applications that comply with WCAG 2.2 Level AAA, using this toolkit and AI skill for enhanced design and usability.

items.name: frontend-design
items.description: 🎨 Transform web UIs into unique, engaging experiences with AI-driven design skills for bold aesthetics and production-ready code.

items.name: web-quality-skills
items.description: 🌐 Optimize web projects with essential skills for performance, accessibility, and SEO, based on Google Lighthouse and Core Web Vitals guidelines.

items.name: Message-Deliverer
items.description: 📩 Create and display messages dynamically with this simple web app, enhancing your frontend skills through clean design and interactive JavaScript.

items.name: html-css-javascript-frontend_course-luisdev_part-28_html-5_css-3_js-es2023
items.description: 🌐 Enhance web skills with this course on HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, focusing on responsive design and modern frontend techniques.

items.name: skillink-frontend-upc
items.description: 🌐 Connect students with academic advisors through a modern web interface built on Angular, enabling easy search, filtering, and booking of consultations.

items.name: Responsive-Landing-Page
items.description: A modern responsive landing page designed with clean UI and smooth layout. It adapts seamlessly across devices, showcasing strong frontend skills, structured content, and user-friendly design for an engaging and professional web experience.
